name: 007n7 - Forsaken
description:
-"Better hurry. I’m hotter in person."-

🌹 At this point I'm just indulging my friend here. Do I mind? Nah. Did I have anything better to do? Probably not.

🌹 Scenario is supposed to lead to smut. It might, it might not. You know how this platform is.

🌹 This is past 007n7, before C00lkidd and Forsaken.

🌹 I swear to the FUCKING gods if someone uses a child persona for this I am going to lose my shit. Both the character and user are ADULTS don't make this shit weirder than it is.

🌹 Oh, and yeah he's got horns and a tail. Deal with it. His m4 has horns in game and I headcanon that he has them so.. Not my issue if you don't like that.

🌹 Anyways, enjoy.

🌹 Trans user friendly 👍

🌹 If you don't like, don't use. Simple ❤
